Movemental — image prompt executor

Full Midjourney and Nano Banana 2 lines, aligned with The Digital Curator. People shots name real individuals only; everything else stays environment, object, texture, or architecture.

People policy (authoritative for this doc).
  • If the image includes identifiable people, the subject must be one or more of: Alan Hirsch, Brad Brisco, or Joshua Shepherd — named explicitly in the prompt (and in production: shot from life or licensed reference, not invented crowds).
  • No synthetic or stock “anonymous” faces. For group contexts, show only the named person clearly; others from behind, silhouetted, or out of frame.
  • Hands-only shots must name whose hands (same three individuals).
  • Other photoreal slots: interiors, still lifes, textures, facades, empty rooms, and product-free desks — no people unless you add a named control below.

/team — headshot series (Nano Banana 2)

Three separate harmony passes for the public /team grid (Joshua Shepherd, Alan Hirsch, Brad Brisco). Each attempt shares one series bible (wardrobe + environment + grade) so the row reads as one editorial set. Prefer reference-led edits from approved photographs; treat generative lines as fallback only, with named consent. Paste into Gemini Flash Image (Nano Banana 2); omit Midjourney flags.

Attempt 1 · Pale plaster atrium (cool daylight)

Series bible: Same background family for all three — soft warm-gray plaster, faint window shadow on one side, north-light calm. Wardrobe: charcoal, ink navy, or warm-white layer; matte fabrics; no visible logos. Grade: deep blue-gray shadows, lifted warm highlights, skin tones consistent across the set; at most one tiny electric-blue accent in the frame (book spine or ceramic edge), never a blue wash. Framing: half-length to three-quarter, relaxed shoulders, eyes to lens, 4:5 vertical, photoreal editorial.

Joshua Shepherd

Reference-led portrait of Joshua Shepherd (real person). Half-length, relaxed posture, gentle closed-mouth smile. Wardrobe: charcoal merino crew or simple navy oxford, no logos. Environment: pale warm-gray plaster wall with soft side daylight from camera left, subtle falloff into blue-gray shadow on the right. Camera: 85mm equivalent look, shallow depth, crisp eyes. Color: Movemental editorial — cool shadow bias, warm skin, off-white fill; optional single tiny #0053db accent on one prop edge only. Vertical 4:5 composition, photoreal documentary calm, high resolution, subtle grain, no text, no logos, no watermark, no invented jewelry patterns.

Alan Hirsch

Reference-led portrait of Alan Hirsch (real person). Half-length, thoughtful calm expression. Wardrobe: ink-navy knit or soft collared shirt without branding. Same pale plaster wall and same window direction as the series bible (daylight from camera left). Match shadow depth and highlight warmth to the Joshua frame for a cohesive pair/trio. 85mm-style compression, vertical 4:5, photoreal editorial, Movemental palette (blue-gray shadows, warm off-white bounce), likeness of Alan Hirsch only, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Brad Brisco

Reference-led portrait of Brad Brisco (real person). Half-length, approachable confidence, relaxed jaw. Wardrobe: warm-white Oxford under soft charcoal cardigan OR simple earth-tone chambray — no logos, no busy patterns. Identical plaster environment and lighting direction as the other two portraits in this attempt. Keep contrast and skin saturation aligned with the set. Vertical 4:5, photoreal editorial, Movemental restrained palette, likeness of Brad Brisco only, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Attempt 2 · Warm oak study (tungsten balance)

Series bible: Shared warm oak bookshelf softly out of focus behind subject; one practical lamp with warm tungsten core (no bare bulb in frame). Wardrobe: camel, oatmeal, or olive knit layers with ink-navy base; textures matte; still no logos. Grade: honeyed midtones with controlled highlights; shadows lean brown-ink, not green; keep all three faces within the same warmth so the row harmonizes. Framing: half-length, slight angle to show shelf rhythm, 4:5 vertical.

Joshua Shepherd

Reference-led portrait of Joshua Shepherd (real person). Half-length, seated or standing before softly blurred oak bookshelves with neutral spines (no readable titles). Single warm lamp bokeh at rear. Wardrobe: oatmeal crew under simple navy jacket, unbranded. Warm tungsten-balanced key with gentle fill from ambient bounce. Match shelf blur scale and lamp warmth to the series bible. Vertical 4:5, photoreal editorial, premium nonprofit annual-report calm, likeness of Joshua Shepherd only, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Alan Hirsch

Reference-led portrait of Alan Hirsch (real person). Half-length, same oak bookshelf vocabulary and lamp warmth as Joshua’s frame in Attempt 2. Wardrobe: olive cotton shirt or camel sweater over collared base, no logos. Slightly lower contrast than a tech headshot — keep highlight roll-off soft. Align white balance and shadow brown-ink bias across the trio. Vertical 4:5, photoreal, likeness of Alan Hirsch only, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Brad Brisco

Reference-led portrait of Brad Brisco (real person). Half-length, same warm study environment: oak shelves softly blurred, warm practical in background, no readable book titles. Wardrobe: chambray or soft plaid at small scale (not loud) with earth-tone layer, still no logos. Preserve identical color temperature and shadow lift as the other two for a synchronized row. Vertical 4:5, photoreal editorial, likeness of Brad Brisco only, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Attempt 3 · Seamless studio split (Digital Curator / tech-meets-formation)

Series bible: Seamless warm-white to cool-gray gradient backdrop (not flat gray); very subtle cool rim from opposite side at low intensity. Wardrobe: minimal tailoring — soft black, graphite, or midnight knit; optional single restrained blue detail (tie, thread, or notebook edge) on one subject only if needed; otherwise keep blue out of wardrobe and reserve accent for props. Grade: high micro-contrast, clean skin, deep blue-gray shadow corners; highlights stay paper-white, never blown. Framing: centered, editorial magazine cover discipline, 4:5 vertical.

Joshua Shepherd

Reference-led portrait of Joshua Shepherd (real person). Half-length, centered, calm neutral smile. Seamless backdrop with gentle warm-to-cool vertical gradient (pale warm top drifting to blue-gray lower third). Wardrobe: graphite crew or soft black unstructured jacket, no logos. Add a whisper of cool rim light from camera right, very low intensity. Match gradient angle and rim strength to the series bible for trio harmony. Vertical 4:5, photoreal editorial, subtle grain, likeness of Joshua Shepherd only, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Alan Hirsch

Reference-led portrait of Alan Hirsch (real person). Half-length, centered, same seamless gradient orientation and rim-light direction as Joshua. Wardrobe: midnight navy sweater or soft charcoal jacket, no logos; avoid bright blue clothing. Keep highlight discipline identical across the set (paper-white caps, skin midtones matched). Optional: single small electric-blue notebook edge on table in lower frame corner only. Vertical 4:5, photoreal, likeness of Alan Hirsch only, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Brad Brisco

Reference-led portrait of Brad Brisco (real person). Half-length, centered, same seamless gradient and rim-light recipe as the other two. Wardrobe: warm-white tee under ink cardigan OR soft olive shirt — matte fabrics only, no logos. Ensure shadow corners match depth and hue to the companion frames so the three sit as one row. Vertical 4:5, photoreal editorial, likeness of Brad Brisco only, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Per-slot overrides appear only where a slot needs people. Regenerate by changing selects and clicking refresh is automatic on change.

Copied
Midjourney: append --ar as shown. Nano Banana 2: paste full line; aspect is spelled in prose. Prefer real photography for people; generative is fallback with named consent and reference workflow.
